equivalence_argument: No equivalent unified read_executor_public_keys call or SpcExecutorRegistryReadFailed mapping was found in the active SPC block-verification path.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: SPC block verification does not call the unified read_executor_public_keys helper for the specific executor set and does not map registry-reader failures into SpcExecutorRegistryReadFailed.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-tee-registry-reader/src/reader.rs exposes read_executor_public_keys, and BlockVerificationError defines SpcExecutorRegistryReadFailed, but verify_spc_calls uses read_expected_executor/read_executor and maps failures to InvalidSpc instead.

notes: Confirmed by exact symbol searches across the audited local repos.
rationale: The primary diff adds the registry-reader crate as a workspace and block-verification dependency, removes the local verifier method, and replaces self.read_executor_public_keys with the unified crate function at the SPC verification key-read point. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When ritual-block-verification verifies SPC calls, it must read executor public keys through ritual_executor_registry_reader::read_executor_public_keys for the specific executor addresses being verified, and map reader failures into SpcExecutorRegistryReadFailed.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct a block with an SPC call from a registered executor and assert verification succeeds when read_executor_public_keys returns that executor's public key; force the reader to fail or omit the key and assert block verification returns SpcExecutorRegistryReadFailed or the subsequent signature failure rather than silently accepting.
summary: SPC verification does not use the unified public-key reader/error mapping required by the invariant.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Force a registry read failure during verify_spc_calls and assert the current code returns InvalidSpc rather than SpcExecutorRegistryReadFailed, demonstrating the missing mapping.
title: SPC verification uses unified registry reader
